issue.title: [bug]: Unable to apply background color (OKLCH / CSS variables) to <option> in Select / native select fallback
issue.body:
### Describe the bug

When using a native <select> element (or fallback rendering), background colors defined using CSS variables or modern color formats like oklch() are not applied to <option> elements.

Example:

--input: oklch(1 0 0 / 15%);
<select className="dark:bg-input/30">
  <option>Option 1</option>
</select>

The background color works correctly on the <select> element itself, but does not apply to <option> elements.

### Affected component/components

Native Select

### How to reproduce

1. <option> ignores background styles in most browsers (especially Chrome).
2. Styles like bg-input/30 or bg-[oklch(...)] do not render.

### Codesandbox/StackBlitz link

_No response_

### Logs

```bash

```

### System Info

```bash
Browser: Chrome (latest)
OS: Windows
Tailwind CSS: v4
shadcn/ui: latest
```
